question_text: Status Finished Started Monday, 6 April 2026, 3:22 PM Completed Monday, 6 April 2026, 3:54 PM Duration 31 mins 56 secs Grade 75.00 out of 100.00 What is the relationship between the number of control objectives and control measures in ISO 27002? Mark 1.00 out of 1.00
